ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecules" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecule */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the molecule */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the molecule */,
  "structure_file" TEXT /* File path to the molecular structure file (e.g., MOL, SDF) */,
  "molecule_type" TEXT /* Type of molecule (e.g., small molecule, peptide, protein) */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* List of synonyms for the molecule */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the molecule */,
  "inchikey" TEXT /* InChIKey of the molecule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the descriptor belongs to */,
  "descriptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor (e.g., BertzCT, Chi0, HallKierAlpha) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the descriptor */,
  "descriptor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor type */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the descriptor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptors_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biological_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological activity (e.g., IC50, EC50) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the biological activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological activity type */,
  "assay_type" TEXT /* Type of assay used to measure the activity */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the activity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biological_activity_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical analysis (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the statistical analysis */,
  "analysis_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical analysis type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Statistical model used */,
  "coefficients" TEXT /* Coefficients of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analysis_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor type (e.g., topological, geometrical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the descriptor type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the descriptor type (e.g., physicochemical, structural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological activity type (e.g., inhibition, activation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological activity type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the biological activity type (e.g., enzymatic, receptor-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical analysis type (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical analysis type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the statistical analysis type (e.g., univariate, multivariate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kappa_shapes" (
  "kappa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kappa shape index */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the kappa shape index belongs to */,
  "kappa1" REAL /* Kappa shape index 1 */,
  "kappa2" REAL /* Kappa shape index 2 */,
  "kappa3" REAL /* Kappa shape index 3 */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the kappa shape index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kappa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kappa_shapes_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tpsa" (
  "tpsa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tPSA */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the tPSA belongs to */,
  "tpsa_value" REAL /* Value of the topological polar surface area */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the tPSA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tpsa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tpsa_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_complexity" (
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular complexity index */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the complexity index belongs to */,
  "complexity_value" REAL /* Value of the molecular complexity index */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the molecular complexity index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complexity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_complexity_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "druglikeness" (
  "druglikeness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug-likeness index */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule the drug-likeness index belongs to */,
  "druglikeness_value" REAL /* Value of the drug-likeness index */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the drug-likeness index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("druglikeness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_druglikeness_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY ("molecule_id") REFERENCES molecules ("molecule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., molecule, descriptor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecule_descriptors" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the descriptor */,
  "descriptor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id", "descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecule_activities" (
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the activity */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("molecule_id", "activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_correlations" (
  "descriptor_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first descriptor */,
  "descriptor_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second descriptor */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the two descriptors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id1", "descriptor_id2")
)
